expected: 完整单论文流程：pdf2doi→去重→mv归档(Zotero名)→MinerU pipeline提取→全部图片WebP→clean→translate→generate→front matter修正(links+tags+date+category)→hugo build验证。slug用firstAuthorYear-description。date自动生成。
